lib/lapack/base/zhsein.reason: zhsein is a driver-level routine invoked via zhseqr/eigenvalue-solver pipelines; the scaffold-generated wrapper files (README, index.js @example, examples/index.js) are not yet authored. base.js is fully implemented and validated against Fortran fixtures. The only remaining ESLint output on base.js is a signature-conformance warning because WORK/RWORK are retained as positional workspace parameters (scaffold expected them to be consumed), matching the pattern used for other workspace-carrying routines like zlaein.

lib/lapack/base/zggsvp3.reason: ESLint OOMs when linting full directory (all hand-authored files lib/*.js, examples/index.js, test/*.js pass with 0 errors individually; the benchmark scaffolds exhaust memory in the jsdoc-doctest rule). Same pattern as lib/lapack/base/dtprfb and lib/lapack/base/ztprfb.

lib/lapack/base/zggsvd3.reason: ESLint's jsdoc-doctest rule runs test.zggsvd3.js in an isolated VM where assert.throws(fn, TypeError) mis-detects the constructor as a validation function (same behavior observed in lib/lapack/base/dggsvd3). All lib/*.js files lint clean with 0 errors individually; base.js and ndarray.js are fully implemented and validated against Fortran fixtures.

lib/lapack/base/dtprfb.reason: ESLint OOMs when linting full directory (lib/ files lint cleanly with 0 errors). Same pattern as lib/lapack/base/ztprfb and lib/lapack/base/dggev.

lib/lapack/base/ztprfb.reason: ESLint OOMs when linting full directory (all individual files pass with 0 errors). Same pattern as lib/lapack/base/dggev.

lib/lapack/base/zlaein.reason: jsdoc-doctest cannot resolve @stdlib/lapack/base/zlaein (not in stdlib checkout); same pre-existing issue as dlaein. base.js is @private, fully implemented, and tests pass against Fortran fixtures.

lib/lapack/base/dhsein.reason: jsdoc-doctest cannot resolve @stdlib/lapack/base/dhsein (not in stdlib checkout); same pre-existing issue as dlaein. base.js is @private, fully implemented, and tests pass against Fortran fixtures. The only base.js ESLint warning is a signature-conformance warning because WORK is in the Fortran signature but not in the stdlib canonical pattern.

lib/lapack/base/dtrsna.reason: dtrsna is an internal LAPACK auxiliary used by dgeevx for condition-number estimation; the scaffold-generated wrapper files (README, index.js @example, examples/index.js) are not authored because dtrsna has no public wrapper surface. base.js is fully implemented and tested against Fortran fixtures. The only ESLint output is a signature-conformance warning because M is returned on the result object (Fortran API has M as an output parameter).

lib/lapack/base/dlaqtr.reason: dlaqtr is an internal LAPACK auxiliary used only by dtrsna (condition-number estimation); the scaffold-generated wrapper files (README, index.js @example, examples/index.js) are not authored because dlaqtr has no public wrapper surface. base.js is fully implemented and tested against Fortran fixtures. The only ESLint output on base.js is a signature-conformance warning because SCALE is returned on the result object rather than being an in/out positional parameter — the same pattern as dlaln2.

lib/lapack/base/dgeevx.reason: jsdoc-doctest cannot resolve @stdlib/lapack/base/dgeevx (not in stdlib checkout); other lint errors match pattern common to eigenvector driver routines (dgeev)

lib/lapack/base/dggev.reason: ESLint OOMs when linting full directory (all individual files pass with 0 errors)

lib/lapack/base/dggevx.reason: Private helper normalizeEigenvectors triggers a false-positive stdlib/signature-conformance warning because the checker matches all functions against the DGGEVX Fortran signature. All real ESLint errors are zero.

lib/lapack/base/zgeevx.reason: ESLint OOMs when linting the benchmark files in this full-driver module (same pattern as dggev). lib/, test/, and examples/ all lint clean individually with 0 errors.

lib/lapack/base/zggevx.reason: jsdoc-doctest evalmachine sandbox does not share TypeError/RangeError constructors with assert.throws; tests pass under node --test. All real ESLint errors are zero across individual files.

lib/lapack/base/dtgex2.reason: Test file uses array-element-newline disable for matrix test data (multi-element per line for readability)

lib/lapack/base/dtrevc.reason: Test files have JSDoc and formatting lint errors common to generated test code (same pattern as dtrevc3 and other eigenvector routines)

lib/lapack/base/zgbsvx.reason: JSDoc paragraph-content-indent errors in FACT/TRANS/EQUED description blocks (same pattern as zgesvx and other svx routines)

lib/lapack/base/zlansf.reason: Test file uses non-whitelisted eslint-disable for packRFP utility with nested var declarations

lib/lapack/base/ztrsna.reason: ESLint OOMs when linting full module directory (all subdirectories lint cleanly individually with 0 errors)
